title: What’s next in the search for a new U-M president?
summary_en: As U-M’s president-elect steps aside for health reasons, the university has options for finding a new leader who will face numerous challenges.
author: Kim Kozlowski
title_cn: 密歇根大学校长当选人因健康原因无法履职 校方将启动新任校长遴选工作

title: Should Michigan follow Mississippi and retain 3rd graders to boost literacy?
summary_en: As leaders discuss ways to improve Michigan test scores, the state of Mississippi repeatedly comes up. Mississippi’s former state literacy director shares ideas on what Michigan can do.
author: Isabel Lohman
title_cn: 密歇根州围绕是否效仿密西西比州实施三年级学生留级制度提升读写能力开展研讨

title: U-M President-elect Kent Syverud announces cancer diagnosis, will not take office
summary_en: The University of Michigan will begin another presidential search after President-elect Kent Syverud was diagnosed with brain cancer.
author: Kim Kozlowski
title_cn: 密歇根大学当选校长肯特·赛弗鲁德确诊癌症 将不就任校长职务
